description_long: This is a compact, rectangular cabinet with a modern, minimalist design, featuring a two-tone color scheme of black and wood brown. The front side displays a single door on the left with a small, round metallic handle, and an open shelf compartment on the right. The cabinet sits on short, sturdy legs, elevating it slightly above the ground. The top, sides, and back are solid and finished in black, while the door panel is a contrasting wood tone. The open shelf area provides easy access for storage or display of small items. The overall construction suggests it is made primarily of wood or engineered wood, with metal hardware for the handle.
description: A small, modern cabinet with a black frame, wood-toned door, and an open shelf compartment. It features a metallic handle and sits on short legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wood-toned door with a metallic handle on the left and an open shelf on the right.
description_view_1: Side view showing the solid black side panel and the depth of the cabinet.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, solid black back panel with no visible features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to view 1, showing the solid black side panel.
